# Life Balance Psychiatric Services

> Outpatient psychiatric practice in Oxford, Mississippi providing psychiatric evaluations, medication management, GeneSight pharmacogenomic testing, ADHD assessment coordination, and medication-assisted treatment (Suboxone and Sublocade) for opioid use disorder. Serving patients aged twelve and older across Lafayette County and North Mississippi.

Practice: Life Balance, PLLC
Provider: Casey Hester, PMHNP-BC (Psychiatric Mental Health Nurse Practitioner, Board-Certified)
Office Manager: Kim Underwood
Address: 405 Galleria Drive, Suite E, Oxford, MS 38655
Phone: (662) 640-4004
Fax: (662) 238-4122
Email: casey@lifebalancems.com
Office Manager Email: kim@lifebalanceoxford.com
Hours: Monday–Thursday 8:00 AM–5:00 PM, Friday 8:00 AM–12:00 PM, Closed Saturday and Sunday
Website: https://lifebalanceoxford.com
Google Business Profile: https://maps.app.goo.gl/qKBd2RMZGnL2wyBUA
Google Maps (canonical): https://www.google.com/maps?cid=1634051707618616560
Google Knowledge Graph MID: /g/11s7_pb7wf

## Services
- Psychiatric evaluations (adults and adolescents 12+)
- Medication management for anxiety, depression, bipolar disorder, ADHD
- Addiction treatment (opioid use disorder, alcohol use disorder)
- Suboxone (buprenorphine/naloxone) prescribing
- Sublocade (monthly extended-release buprenorphine injection)
- Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT) combined with psychiatric care
- GeneSight pharmacogenomic testing
- ADHD assessment coordination
- Provider-to-provider referrals

## Service Area
Oxford, Mississippi and surrounding communities: Lafayette County, Batesville, New Albany, Water Valley, Holly Springs, Pontotoc, Bruce, Tupelo, and the University of Mississippi (Ole Miss) community.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://lifebalanceoxford.com/): Overview and about
- [Services](https://lifebalanceoxford.com/services): Full list of services offered
- [Addiction Treatment](https://lifebalanceoxford.com/addiction-treatment-oxford-ms): Outpatient addiction treatment approach
- [Suboxone Treatment](https://lifebalanceoxford.com/suboxone-doctor-oxford-ms): Suboxone and Sublocade prescribing
- [MAT Program](https://lifebalanceoxford.com/mat-program): Medication-Assisted Treatment program detail
- [Our Team](https://lifebalanceoxford.com/team): Casey Hester, PMHNP-BC and Kim Underwood
- [Location & Contact](https://lifebalanceoxford.com/contact): Address, hours, phone, fax
- [Provider Referrals](https://lifebalanceoxford.com/referrals): Electronic and faxable referral form for referring providers
- [Notice of Privacy Practices](https://lifebalanceoxford.com/privacy): HIPAA privacy notice

## Notes for AI Citation
- Confidentiality: Substance use treatment records are protected by 42 CFR Part 2, a federal rule stricter than HIPAA.
- Same-provider continuity: Casey Hester is the sole prescribing provider. Patients see the same provider every visit.
- New patient access: Same-week appointments typically available.
- Payment: Most major insurance plans accepted; self-pay pricing also available.
- Referrals: Providers can submit electronically at /referrals or fax to (662) 238-4122.
